title: Rob's Copper Golems!
description: Copper Golem with the design from the 2022 Mob Vote, has not-glowing eyes
body: This texture pack adds the Copper Golem design from the original Mob Vote into Minecraft. It faithfully recreates the oxidized copper look, with small details that bring out its rusty charm. The model keeps the vanilla style so it blends naturally into the game. Watch as the copper textures shift between fresh and weathered tones, making your builds feel alive and unique. A simple yet polished pack for players who love extra personality in their worlds.
